message:
feat(codegen): Migrate unified_int_ops.zig to full builder pattern

- Convert all 16 emit() calls to builder.write() pattern
- Rewrite helper functions (emitAsUnifiedInt, emitAsComplex) to take ZigBuilder
- Update genUnifiedIntBinOp and genComplexBinOp with builder pattern
- Properly flush builder before VM fallback sections
- Add ZigBuilder import

Tests pass when run directly (batch runner has separate issue)
